race.description: Peter Rundle Mla Nationals Wa Handicap
race.comment: HARLEQUIN PRANCER (4) brought up the hat-trick last start with a strong performance when winning a CL5 by 1.1L. Back up to 1400m now where she's unbeaten at this track and trip. She continues to raise the back and while she has drawn a touch awkwardly here, she has the class to extend her winning run. ZADOWS LANDING (1) finished off nicely last start following a disappointing performance two back as the short favourite. He's drawn slightly better this time around for Wheatley and he can return to winning ways in what looks a suitable event. CAP CAVOUR (5) stuck on well behind HARLEQUIN PRANCER last time out, ending up 1.1L off the winner. He's likely to get back in the run again, but may not be spotting her as big of a head start this time. Can turn the tables. LACIE ACE (9) has to be included with form tying in through HARLEQUIN PRANCER. JET PLANES (8) draws the inside and looks an improver.
